name: Cajun Lamb Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all curry ingredients in a large pot.
2. Add the chopped green bell peppers and stir to coat.
3. Cook over medium heat for 10 minutes or until fragrant.
4. Stir in the softened butter and allow it to melt.
5. Add the cooked rice and mix well.
6. Add the unpeeled apple, softened banana, and melted margarine.
7. Simmer for 20-30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
9. Garnish with chopped onions before serving.
